name: gemdex
description: Semantic code search via Gemini embeddings + Milvus. Ships the gemdex MCP server, a PostToolUse hook that auto-reindexes after edits, and a skill that nudges Claude to prefer semantic search over Grep/Glob for intent-based queries.

gemini_api_key.title: Gemini API key
gemini_api_key.description: Google AI Studio API key. Get one at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey.

milvus_address.title: Milvus address
milvus_address.description: host:port of your Milvus instance (e.g. localhost:19530).

milvus_token.title: Milvus auth token (optional)
milvus_token.description: Auth token for Milvus instances that have authentication enabled. Leave blank for unauthenticated local Milvus.
